name: First Entertainment
description_short: Credit union specializing in banking services for entertainment industry professionals, offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards tailored to creators' irregular income patterns.
description_long: First Entertainment Credit Union is a specialized financial institution dedicated to serving entertainment industry professionals, including actors, crew members, technicians, and other creators. The organization positions itself as a banking partner that understands the unique financial challenges of working in entertainment, where income is often irregular and project-based. Founded to address gaps in traditional banking for this demographic, First Entertainment operates both physical branch locations and comprehensive digital banking platforms to serve its membership base. The credit union maintains physical branch presence on studio lots and other locations convenient to entertainment professionals, alongside 24/7 digital banking access. First Entertainment offers a comprehensive suite of financial products designed specifically for entertainment workers. These include personal and business checking and savings accounts, personal and business credit cards (Platinum Visa), various loan products including union dues loans, home equity loans, and term certificates. The institution provides specialized services such as Skip-A-Pay options, custom lending for union membership dues (SAG, IATSE, etc.), and appointment-based branch services for account opening and loan applications. Their digital banking platform enables members to manage finances flexibly around demanding entertainment industry schedules. What distinguishes First Entertainment is its deep specialization in the entertainment industry rather than serving general consumer populations. The credit union explicitly markets products and messaging around the realities of entertainment work—multiple projects throughout the year, irregular payment schedules, long on-set hours, and global work locations. They offer unique loan products like union dues financing that traditional banks typically do not provide. Member testimonials specifically highlight appreciation for understanding the industry's nuances, fee-friendly accounts for inconsistent income, and convenient branch locations on studio lots where members can deposit paychecks immediately. First Entertainment is a legitimate credit union offering competitive rates and member-focused services. However, the organization's narrow focus on entertainment professionals means it may have limited membership eligibility requirements that exclude non-entertainment workers. The website does not provide extensive detail about membership eligibility criteria, making it unclear how strictly they enforce industry membership. As a credit union, it operates on a membership basis rather than serving all consumers. The organization undergoes scheduled maintenance on digital banking systems and maintains limited hours on certain days, which could impact accessibility compared to larger banks.
services: Union dues loans (SAG, IATSE membership financing)
Home equity loans (as low as 7.25% APR)
Digital banking platform and mobile banking
In-branch appointment scheduling and member experience center services
pros: Specializes in union dues loans (SAG, IATSE membership) at 8.90% APR, a product rarely offered by traditional banks
Skip-A-Pay option available, helping members manage cash flow during gaps between project payments
Branch locations on studio lots allow members to deposit checks immediately after receiving payment on set
Custom banking services designed around entertainment industry income patterns and project-based work schedules
Member new account bonus of $350 for eligible new members
24/7 surcharge-free ATM network and digital banking access for members with unpredictable schedules
Term Certificates offering competitive rates up to 3.85% APY
cons: Membership appears restricted to entertainment industry professionals, limiting accessibility to general consumers
Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility requirements or application process details
Scheduled digital banking maintenance windows (e.g., 11 P.M.–3 A.M.) create temporary access interruptions
Limited branch hours on certain days and holiday closures, though digital services remain available
No information provided about overdraft fees, monthly account fees, or other standard banking charges
best_for: SAG/IATSE union members needing specialized union dues financing
Freelance entertainment professionals (filmmakers, crew, technicians) with irregular income patterns
Entertainment industry employees seeking banking services designed around on-set and project schedules
Creators seeking fee-friendly accounts and lenders who understand entertainment work income volatility
diagnosis: First Entertainment Credit Union is best suited for entertainment industry professionals who work on union sets or in entertainment roles and need flexible banking around irregular project-based income. The main caveat is that membership eligibility appears restricted to entertainment industry workers, and the website does not transparently disclose membership requirements, making it essential to verify eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
